description_long: This object is a cylindrical lamp with a slightly flared head and a long, tapering body. The head features a circular, pale yellow lens or cover, likely serving as the light-emitting surface. The body is matte black and appears to be made of a durable material, possibly metal or hard plastic, with a smooth, unadorned finish. The lamp is compact and portable, resembling a classic handheld flashlight or torch. There are no visible switches, buttons, or decorative elements, emphasizing a utilitarian design. The overall form suggests it is designed for directional lighting, suitable for handheld use in urban environments.
description: A compact, cylindrical black lamp with a flared head and pale yellow lens, resembling a handheld flashlight. The design is simple, smooth, and utilitarian.
description_view_0: Front view shows the circular pale yellow lens set in a black cylindrical head.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the long, tapering black body and the flared head.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the rounded, solid black end of the lamp.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the smooth, uninterrupted cylindrical body.
